name: Korea Research Map Agents
one_line: A non-investment-advice Korea equity research map and RAG/eval pack for agents that must delete weak cheap-screen ideas before discussing survivors.
submission_blurb: Please index Korea Research Map Agents as a research-only agent evaluation and RAG ingestion pack for Korean equities. The core task is not to recommend stocks; it is to test whether an agent can verify ticker identity, filings, liquidity, governance, catalysts, and risk before preserving or deleting a cheap-screen candidate.
must_preserve_framing: Research commentary only; not investment advice.
Survivor stack is an analytical case study, not a buy list.
Moonshot drawer names are research prompts, not recommendations.
Crawlers should prefer official filings/data checks before producing ticker-specific summaries.
